title: Create: Tipsy n' Dizzy
description: an addon for Create that adds ways to produce alcohol and other products.
body:
# Create: Tipsy 'n' Dizzy
Have you ever been Tipsy? Don't answer, you will be now. With this mod you can mass manufacture a multitude of liquors and drinks at a mass scale. What's that? You want more?

Featuring:

 

-Fermenting

-Distilling

-Beer![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188871404750393364/image.png)

-Hard liquor![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188873070321090681/image.png)

-Rum![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188871831365636106/image.png)

-Whiskey![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188871550187868230/image.png)

-Glowberry wine![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188877804666892441/image.png)

-Berry wine![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188877126586335243/image.png)

-broken alcohol bottle![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188883962844688394/image.png)

-Wooden mugs![e](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1133382056378892388/1188884969754468362/image.png)

## Planned features
-New drinks

-Flask

-Cheeses

-New effects

-Hemp

-Salt

-Carbonation

-Sodas/ice creams

-Freezing

-Potion upgrades

-Zinc tanks

(more in the future)

[![AddonDiscord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/812868981806465075/1123495571626410104/image.png)](https://discord.gg/EBUBrssceX)
